title: Enterprise License Plan for Premium Feature Gating
description:
Introduce an enterprise license type to DataTools Pro to gate early-stage features (like the initiative tracker) from free and paid team users. Enterprise features would only be available to specific enterprise customers (e.g., Fundcanna and pipeline customers).

This provides a mechanism to ship early versions of premium features to production while restricting access to enterprise-tier customers only.
acceptance_criteria: An enterprise license type exists in the DataTools Pro plan structure
Enterprise-only features are not visible to free or paid team users
Enterprise customers can access gated features like the initiative tracker
The license type can be assigned to specific customer accounts
middleware_changes: License type check added to gate enterprise-only features based on the customer's plan tier.
data_model_changes: Enterprise license type added to the plan/license model to distinguish between free, paid, and enterprise tiers.
implementation_notes: This establishes the foundation for the enterprise feature gating system. Related to MBT-1181 (Enterprise Feature Gating) which implements the full feature gate middleware and Blade directives.
